field.presentationExpression: Case When ItemPresentation = TagName Then ItemPresentation When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then TagName When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then ItemPresentation + " (" + TagName + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then TagName + " (" + ItemPresentation + ")" Else ItemPresentation End

Case When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then NameOfRole When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then RolePresentation + " (" + NameOfRole + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then NameOfRole + " (" + RolePresentation + ")" Else RolePresentation End

Case When ObjectPresentation2 = ObjectName2 Then ObjectPresentation2 When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then ObjectName2 When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then ObjectPresentation2 + " (" + ObjectName2 + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then ObjectName2 + " (" + ObjectPresentation2 + ")" Else ObjectPresentation2 End

Case When RolePresentation3 = NameOfRole2 Then RolePresentation2 When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then NameOfRole2 When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then RolePresentation2 + " (" + NameOfRole2 + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then NameOfRole2 + " (" + RolePresentation2 + ")" Else RolePresentation2 End

Case When RightPresentation2 = NameOfRight2 Then RightPresentation2 When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then NameOfRight2 When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then RightPresentation2 + " (" + NameOfRight2 + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then NameOfRight2 + " (" + RightPresentation2 + ")" Else RightPresentation2 End

Case When ObjectPresentation3 = ObjectName3 Then ObjectPresentation3 When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then ObjectName3 When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then ObjectPresentation3 + " (" + ObjectName3 + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then ObjectName3 + " (" + ObjectPresentation3 + ")" Else ObjectPresentation3 End

Case When RolePresentation3 = NameOfRole3 Then RolePresentation3 When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then NameOfRole3 When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then RolePresentation3 + " (" + NameOfRole3 + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then NameOfRole3 + " (" + RolePresentation3 + ")" Else RolePresentation3 End

Case When &NameFormatSelected = 1 Then NameOfRole4 When &NameFormatSelected = 2 Then RolePresentation4 + " (" + NameOfRole4 + ")" When &NameFormatSelected = 3 Then NameOfRole4 + " (" + RolePresentation4 + ")" Else RolePresentation4 End

v8:item.v8:content: Show objects and roles without rights
Do not warn about large report size
- Viewing and programmatic reading and update (R - read, U - update, I - insert)
- Viewing and programmatic reading and update (R - read, U - update, I - insert)
Detailed role rights that apply to metadata object
Role and profile rights that apply to metadata object
Role and profile rights that apply to metadata object
Show objects and profiles without rights
